  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Tile installed on a single-layer subfloor with excessive deflection",
    "Cracked grout lines and loose tiles due to inadequate subfloor stiffness"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the affected tile flooring and underlayment",
    "Reinforce the subfloor to meet L/360 deflection limits by adding a second layer of plywood or sistering joists",
    "Reinstall tile and grout according to TCNA guidelines"
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing ceramic or stone tile directly over a single-layer subfloor without adequate structural support or underlayment violates TCNA guidelines and manufacturer instructions. The resulting deflection under load causes grout cracking, tile tenting, and bond failure, rendering the installation failed.",
  "references": [
    "TCNA Handbook for Ceramic, Glass, and Stone Tile Installation",
    "ANSI A108/A118"
  ]
}
